title: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (PEG) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG ) Q3 2023 Results Conference Call October 31, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Carlotta Chan - VP, IR Ralph LaRossa - Chair, President & CEO Dan Cregg - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Nicholas Campanella - Barclays Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Jeremy Tonet - JPMorgan Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Carly Davenport - Goldman Sachs Travis Miller - Morningstar Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. My name is Rob, and I am your operator today.

title: PSEG (PEG) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: PSEG's (PEG) third-quarter 2023 adjusted earnings beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 13.3%. Revenues increase by 8.1% on a year-over-year basis.

title: PSEG (PEG) Tops Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: PSEG (PEG) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.85 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.75 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.86 per share a year ago.

title: PSEG Announces Third Quarter 2023 Results
text: $0.27 Per Share Net Income $0.85 Per Share Non-GAAP Operating Earnings Re-Affirms Full-Year 2023 Non-GAAP Operating EPS Guidance Range of $3.40 - $3.50  NEWARK, N.J. , Oct. 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE: PEG) reported third quarter 2023 Net Income of $139 million, or $0.27 per share, compared to Net Income of $114 million, or $0.22 per share, for the third quarter 2022.
